title: Centene CEO Michael Neidorff takes medical leave
text: Centene Corp said on Thursday its board had approved a request from its chairman and chief executive officer Michael Neidorff for a period of medical leave, effective immediately.

title: Lee Ainslie's Maverick Capital Is Buying Up Credit Card Stocks

title: CENTENE ANNOUNCES APPROVAL OF REQUEST BY MICHAEL NEIDORFF, CHAIRMAN & CEO, TO TAKE A MEDICAL LEAVE OF ABSENCE
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) ("Centene") announced today that its Board of Directors approved a request from Michael Neidorff, Chairman & Chief Executive Officer, for a medical leave of absence. James Dallas has been named Acting Chairman of the Board.

title: Coalition of Black Birth Justice Leaders to Advance Health Equity for Black Californians, Funded by $150,000 Health Net Grant
text: SACRAMENTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Health Net, one of California's longest serving and most experienced Medi-Cal partners, awarded a $150,000 grant to the UCSF California Preterm Birth Initiative (PTBi) and Cherished Futures for Black Moms & Babies (Cherished Futures). The organizations will use the funds to build a statewide coalition to advance Black birth justice. title: Centene (CNC) Boosts Presence in Louisiana With Contract Win
text: Centene's (CNC) latest contract renewal tends to improve health outcomes of Medicaid members of Louisiana.

title: Community-Based Organizations Serving Populations with Low COVID Vaccination Rates Receive More Than $4.5 Million in Grants from Health Net
text: SACRAMENTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Health Net, one of California's longest serving and most experienced Medi-Cal partners, awarded more than $4.5 million to community-based nonprofits to help vaccinate communities hardest hit by COVID and increase vaccine equity. “After serving California's most vulnerable residents for more than four decades, we understand that healthcare is best delivered locally,” said Martha Santana-Chin, Medi-Cal President of Health Net. “When we set out to dispel myths

title: CENTENE OREGON HEALTH PLAN ACHIEVES NCQA ACCREDITATION
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) today announced that the National Committee for Quality Assurance (NCQA) has awarded Trillium Community Health Plan a Health Plan Accreditation status of "Accredited" for the Medicaid product. The NCQA evaluates how well a health plan manages all parts of its delivery system to continuously improve the quality of care and services provided to its members.

title: Centene Subsidiary Louisiana Healthcare Connections Selected to Continue Serving Louisiana's Medicaid Managed Care Program Statewide
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today its subsidiary Louisiana Healthcare Connections was selected by the Louisiana Department of Health to continue administering quality, integrated healthcare services to Medicaid enrollees across the state. The new statewide contract is anticipated to begin July 1, 2022.

title: Centene shares up 2.9% premarket after earnings top estimates
text: Centene Corp. shares CNC, +0.27% rose 2.9% premarket Tuesday, after the managed care company beat estimates for the fourth quarter. The company posted net income of $599 million, or $1.01 a share, for the quarter, after a loss of $12 million, or 2 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: CENTENE CORPORATION REPORTS 2021 RESULTS
text: ST. LOUIS, Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today its financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2021, reporting diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $1.01 and $2.28, respectively, and adjusted diluted EPS of $1.01 and $5.15, respectively. In summary, the 2021 fourth quarter and full year results were as follows: 2021 Results Q4 Full Year Total revenues (in millions) $             32,568 $           125,982 Premium and service revenues (in millions) $             30,493 $           117,983 Health benefits ratio 87.9% 87.8% SG&A expense ratio 9.3% 8.6% Adjusted SG&A expense ratio (1) 9.2% 8.4% GAAP diluted EPS $                  1.01 $                  2.28 Adjusted diluted EPS (1) $                  1.01 $                  5.15 Total cash flow provided by operations (in millions) $                   675 $                4,205 (1) A full reconciliation of the adjusted SG&A expense ratio and adjusted diluted EPS is shown beginning on page 7 of this release.
